NAME

webrtc_signaling_callbacks_t - Signaling callbacks for sending SDP/ICE.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/peer_manager.h>

Data Fields


webrtc_send_sdp_callback_t send_sdp
Send SDP via ACDS. webrtc_send_ice_callback_t send_ice
Send ICE via ACDS. void * user_data
Passed to callbacks.

Detailed Description

Signaling callbacks for sending SDP/ICE.
